channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Spectacle Will Not Be Broadcast
item.description: Patriotic fervor at UFC Freedom 250 faces a media blackout.

item.title: D-Backs Pitcher Ryan Thompson Defends Giants Players’ Christian Expression
item.description: A fellow believer supports San Francisco Giants players facing backlash for sharing their Christian faith.

item.title: Gays, We Brought the Backlash on Ourselves
item.description: It is time for the gay community to settle down and stop demanding indulgence from the nation.

item.title: The Left Never Loved Athletic Activism, Just Athletes Who Agreed With Them
item.description: The left’s shift from celebrating the First Amendment to using it as a weapon is hard to ignore.
